description: A minimal VS Code extension for running structured discussions across multiple ACP-compatible coding agents.
viewsContainer.title: Agent Debate
config.title: Agent Debate
config.agents.description: ACP agents that will participate in the structured discussion. Install and authenticate the corresponding CLIs before use.
config.agents.label: Display label shown in the panel.
config.agents.enabled: Whether this agent participates by default.
config.agents.env: Extra environment variables passed to the agent process.
config.defaultRounds: Default number of discussion rounds (excluding the final synthesis round).
config.defaultModerator: Default moderator agent ID. Leave empty to auto-select the first successfully started agent.
config.promptStyle: Prompt framing used for the structured debate.
config.startupTimeoutSeconds: Timeout in seconds for ACP agent startup (initialize + session/new). Increase if agents are slow to connect.
config.minAgents: Minimum number of agents that must be ready before starting the debate. If fewer agents are available after all retries, the debate is aborted.
config.startupRetries: Number of times to retry connecting failed agents before giving up. Set to 0 to disable retries.
